prompt: Draft a concise non-destructive security exposure review using only supplied approved evidence. Your first output characters must be exactly ## Scope. Do not write planning text, a preamble, a readiness statement, or any text before that heading. Use exactly these H2 headings and no others: Scope; Severity-Ranked Findings; Sanitized Evidence; Remediation; Verification Needed; Approval Needed; Evidence Quality. Do not expose secrets, claim tests were run when only documents were reviewed, exploit any target, change dependencies, or recommend production action without approval. In Approval Needed, include the exact word approval. Keep Severity-Ranked Findings to at most 6 bullets, Remediation to at most 6 bullets, Verification Needed to at most 6 bullets, and the full output under 850 words.
